description: Bookings Backend — .NET 10 vertical slice implementation of the bookings bounded context with full CRUD, status transitions, overlap detection, and service snapshotting

userStories.title: Booking and BookingService domain entities, EF Core configuration, and migration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Booking and BookingService entities persisted to the database so that all subsequent slices can read and write booking data.
acceptanceCriteria: Chairly.Domain/Entities/Booking.cs created with: public Guid Id, TenantId, ClientId, StaffMemberId; public DateTimeOffset StartTime, EndTime, CreatedAtUtc; public Guid CreatedBy; public string? Notes (max 1000); public DateTimeOffset? UpdatedAtUtc, ConfirmedAtUtc, StartedAtUtc, CompletedAtUtc, CancelledAtUtc, NoShowAtUtc; public Guid? UpdatedBy, ConfirmedBy, StartedBy, CompletedBy, CancelledBy, NoShowBy; public List<BookingService> BookingServices { get; set; } = []

Chairly.Domain/Entities/BookingService.cs created with: public Guid Id; public Guid ServiceId; public string ServiceName { get; set; } = string.Empty; public TimeSpan Duration; public decimal Price; public int SortOrder

Chairly.Infrastructure/Persistence/Configurations/BookingConfiguration.cs created (internal sealed class, #pragma warning disable CA1812): builder.ToTable("Bookings"); HasKey(b => b.Id); Property TenantId required; Property ClientId required; Property StaffMemberId required; Property StartTime required; Property EndTime required; Property Notes optional HasMaxLength(1000); Property CreatedBy required; all optional Guid? and DateTimeOffset? timestamp fields set IsRequired(false); HasIndex(b => b.TenantId); HasIndex(b => new { b.TenantId, b.StaffMemberId }); HasIndex(b => new { b.TenantId, b.StartTime }); OwnsMany(b => b.BookingServices, bs => { bs.ToTable("BookingServices"); bs.WithOwner(); bs.HasKey(s => s.Id); bs.Property(s => s.ServiceId).IsRequired(); bs.Property(s => s.ServiceName).IsRequired().HasMaxLength(200); bs.Property(s => s.Price).HasColumnType("decimal(10,2)"); bs.Property(s => s.SortOrder).IsRequired(); })

Chairly.Infrastructure/Persistence/DesignTimeDbContextFactory.cs created if it does not already exist: internal sealed class DesignTimeDbContextFactory : IDesignTimeDbContextFactory<ChairlyDbContext> { public ChairlyDbContext CreateDbContext(string[] args) { var options = new DbContextOptionsBuilder<ChairlyDbContext>().UseNpgsql("Host=localhost;Database=chairly_design;Username=postgres;Password=postgres").Options; return new ChairlyDbContext(options); } } — add #pragma warning disable CA1812 above the class
ChairlyDbContext.cs updated: add public DbSet<Booking> Bookings => Set<Booking>(); after the existing Clients DbSet

EF Core migration created by running from the repo root: dotnet ef migrations add AddBookings --project src/backend/Chairly.Infrastructure --startup-project src/backend/Chairly.Api --output-dir Persistence/Migrations — if this is the first migration ever, a Migrations/ folder will be created; if prior migrations exist they will be preserved
dotnet build src/backend/Chairly.slnx passes
dotnet test src/backend/Chairly.slnx passes
dotnet format src/backend/Chairly.slnx --verify-no-changes passes
userStories.notes: Follow the pattern of ClientConfiguration.cs exactly. The OwnsMany configuration for BookingServices must be inside BookingConfiguration — do NOT create a separate BookingServiceConfiguration file. BookingService.Id is a Guid primary key (auto-assigned at creation, not meaningful in the domain). ServiceId in BookingService has no FK constraint to Services — this is intentional to preserve booking history after service deletion. For the migration command: if 'dotnet ef' is not installed globally, install it with 'dotnet tool install --global dotnet-ef' first. Run the command from the repo root (C:\Projects\Prive\Chairly\Chairly or equivalent). The --output-dir path is relative to the --project directory.

userStories.title: Get bookings list and get single booking handlers and endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I need GET /api/bookings and GET /api/bookings/{id} endpoints so that the frontend can display the booking list and booking details.
acceptanceCriteria: Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/BookingResponse.cs created: internal sealed record BookingResponse(Guid Id, Guid ClientId, Guid StaffMemberId, DateTimeOffset StartTime, DateTimeOffset EndTime, string? Notes, string Status, IEnumerable<BookingServiceResponse> Services, DateTimeOffset CreatedAtUtc, DateTimeOffset? UpdatedAtUtc, DateTimeOffset? ConfirmedAtUtc, DateTimeOffset? StartedAtUtc, DateTimeOffset? CompletedAtUtc, DateTimeOffset? CancelledAtUtc, DateTimeOffset? NoShowAtUtc)
Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/BookingServiceResponse.cs created: internal sealed record BookingServiceResponse(Guid ServiceId, string ServiceName, TimeSpan Duration, decimal Price, int SortOrder)

Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/GetBookingsList/GetBookingsListQuery.cs created: internal sealed class GetBookingsListQuery : IRequest<IEnumerable<BookingResponse>> { public DateOnly? Date { get; set; } public Guid? StaffMemberId { get; set; } } — add #pragma warning disable CA1812

Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/GetBookingsList/GetBookingsListHandler.cs created: queries db.Bookings.Include(b => b.BookingServices) where TenantId == DefaultTenantId, applies optional Date filter (b.StartTime.Date == query.Date.Value.ToDateTime(TimeOnly.MinValue).Date), applies optional StaffMemberId filter, orders by StartTime ascending, maps to BookingResponse using a ToResponse helper that derives Status using the priority order: CancelledAtUtc!=null→'Cancelled', NoShowAtUtc!=null→'NoShow', CompletedAtUtc!=null→'Completed', StartedAtUtc!=null→'InProgress', ConfirmedAtUtc!=null→'Confirmed', else→'Scheduled'

Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/GetBookingsList/GetBookingsListEndpoint.cs created: MapGet("/", async ([AsParameters] GetBookingsListQuery query, IMediator mediator, CancellationToken ct) => Results.Ok(await mediator.Send(query, ct).ConfigureAwait(false)))
Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/GetBooking/GetBookingQuery.cs created: internal sealed record GetBookingQuery(Guid Id) : IRequest<OneOf<BookingResponse, NotFound>>
Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/GetBooking/GetBookingHandler.cs created: looks up booking by Id and TenantId with Include(BookingServices), returns NotFound if null, else BookingResponse
Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/GetBooking/GetBookingEndpoint.cs created: MapGet("/{id:guid}", ...) returns Results.Ok on success, Results.NotFound() on NotFound

Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/BookingEndpoints.cs created: internal static class BookingEndpoints with MapBookingEndpoints extension method on IEndpointRouteBuilder, groups under '/api/bookings', calls all individual MapXxx extension methods
Program.cs updated: add 'using Chairly.Api.Features.Bookings;' and 'app.MapBookingEndpoints();' after app.MapClientEndpoints()
dotnet build src/backend/Chairly.slnx passes
dotnet test src/backend/Chairly.slnx passes
dotnet format src/backend/Chairly.slnx --verify-no-changes passes
userStories.notes: Use GetBookingsListQuery with [AsParameters] binding so the optional 'date' and 'staffMemberId' query params are bound from the query string (same pattern as ASP.NET Core parameter binding). For the Date filter: compare using StartTime.Date — in EF Core with Npgsql, use b.StartTime.Date == query.Date.Value.ToDateTime(TimeOnly.MinValue) or cast via EF.Functions. Simplest approach: filter in-memory after ToListAsync if EF Core cannot translate the Date comparison, but try EF translation first. The ToResponse helper (internal static method on the handler) should be reused by ALL subsequent handlers — define it as 'internal static BookingResponse ToResponse(Booking b)' so CreateBookingHandler etc. can call GetBookingsListHandler.ToResponse(booking). Import OneOf and OneOf.Types as needed.

userStories.title: Create booking handler and endpoint
userStories.description: As an owner, manager, or staff member, I want to create a booking so that I can schedule a client visit with service snapshotting and overlap detection.
acceptanceCriteria: Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/CreateBooking/CreateBookingCommand.cs created with Data Annotations: [Required] Guid ClientId, [Required] Guid StaffMemberId, [Required] DateTimeOffset StartTime, List<Guid> ServiceIds = [], string? Notes with [MaxLength(1000)] — add #pragma warning disable CA1812

Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/CreateBooking/CreateBookingHandler.cs created returning OneOf<BookingResponse, NotFound, Conflict>: (1) validate ServiceIds.Count >= 1 — throw ValidationException with key 'ServiceIds' and message 'At least one service is required.' if empty; (2) verify client exists for tenant and DeletedAtUtc == null — return NotFound if not; (3) verify staff member exists for tenant and DeactivatedAtUtc == null — return NotFound if not; (4) load all services by IDs for tenant where IsActive == true — return NotFound if count != command.ServiceIds.Count; (5) calculate endTime = command.StartTime + TimeSpan sum of service durations ordered by command.ServiceIds index; (6) check overlap: any booking where TenantId == DefaultTenantId && StaffMemberId == command.StaffMemberId && CancelledAtUtc == null && NoShowAtUtc == null && StartTime < endTime && EndTime > command.StartTime — return Conflict if overlap found; (7) create Booking with new Guid Id, TenantId = DefaultTenantId, CreatedAtUtc = UtcNow, CreatedBy = Guid.Empty (#pragma disable MA0026), BookingServices mapped from services in command.ServiceIds order with SortOrder = index, ServiceName/Duration/Price snapshotted; (8) db.Bookings.Add(booking); await db.SaveChangesAsync; return GetBookingsListHandler.ToResponse(booking)

Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/CreateBooking/CreateBookingEndpoint.cs created: MapPost("/", ...) — on BookingResponse returns Results.Created($"/api/bookings/{result.Id}", result), on NotFound returns Results.NotFound(), on Conflict returns Results.Conflict()
BookingEndpoints.cs updated to call MapCreateBooking()
dotnet build src/backend/Chairly.slnx passes
dotnet test src/backend/Chairly.slnx passes
dotnet format src/backend/Chairly.slnx --verify-no-changes passes
userStories.notes: The ValidationException is the custom type from Chairly.Api.Shared.Mediator.ValidationException — it takes a Dictionary<string, string[]> errors (same as used by the ValidationBehavior pipeline). The ValidationBehavior already handles Data Annotations automatically. For manual cross-entity validation failures (empty service list), throw ValidationException directly in the handler. For the service snapshot order: preserve the order from command.ServiceIds (same index = same SortOrder). Use #pragma warning disable/restore MA0026 around Guid.Empty for CreatedBy. The Conflict type is Chairly.Api.Shared.Results.Conflict (not OneOf.Types). NotFound is OneOf.Types.NotFound. Verify these by checking existing DeleteClientHandler.cs as the reference.

userStories.title: Update booking and cancel booking handlers and endpoints
userStories.description: As an owner or manager, I want to update or cancel a booking so I can correct mistakes, reschedule, or handle client cancellations.
acceptanceCriteria: Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/UpdateBooking/UpdateBookingCommand.cs created: Guid Id (from route, not body), [Required] Guid ClientId, [Required] Guid StaffMemberId, [Required] DateTimeOffset StartTime, List<Guid> ServiceIds = [], string? Notes with [MaxLength(1000)] — add #pragma warning disable CA1812

Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/UpdateBooking/UpdateBookingHandler.cs created returning OneOf<BookingResponse, NotFound, Conflict>: (1) load existing booking with Include(BookingServices) — NotFound if null; (2) return Conflict if booking is in terminal state (CompletedAtUtc != null || CancelledAtUtc != null || NoShowAtUtc != null); (3) validate ServiceIds.Count >= 1 via ValidationException; (4) verify client exists for tenant and not deleted — NotFound if not; (5) verify staff exists and active — NotFound if not; (6) load services — NotFound if any missing/inactive; (7) calculate newEndTime; (8) overlap check — same as create but exclude the current booking id: && b.Id != command.Id; (9) return Conflict if overlap; (10) update booking fields, clear and rebuild BookingServices collection, set UpdatedAtUtc = UtcNow, UpdatedBy = Guid.Empty (#pragma disable MA0026); (11) await db.SaveChangesAsync; return ToResponse

Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/UpdateBooking/UpdateBookingEndpoint.cs created: MapPut("/{id:guid}", async (Guid id, UpdateBookingCommand command, IMediator mediator, CancellationToken ct) => { command.Id = id; ... }) — result matches to Ok/NotFound/Conflict
Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/CancelBooking/CancelBookingCommand.cs created: internal sealed record CancelBookingCommand(Guid Id) : IRequest<OneOf<Success, NotFound, Conflict>>

Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/CancelBooking/CancelBookingHandler.cs created: load booking, NotFound if null, Conflict if CompletedAtUtc != null || CancelledAtUtc != null || NoShowAtUtc != null, set CancelledAtUtc = UtcNow and CancelledBy = Guid.Empty, SaveChanges, return Success — note: cancelling an InProgress booking (StartedAtUtc set) IS allowed
Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/CancelBooking/CancelBookingEndpoint.cs created: MapPost("/{id:guid}/cancel", ...) returns NoContent/NotFound/Conflict
BookingEndpoints.cs updated to call MapUpdateBooking() and MapCancelBooking()
dotnet build src/backend/Chairly.slnx passes
dotnet test src/backend/Chairly.slnx passes
dotnet format src/backend/Chairly.slnx --verify-no-changes passes
userStories.notes: For clearing and rebuilding BookingServices on update: remove all existing items from the collection (booking.BookingServices.Clear()) then add new ones. EF Core will handle deletes/inserts for owned entity collections. For UpdateBookingEndpoint: the Id comes from the route parameter and must be assigned to command.Id before sending — the command itself is bound from the request body. The CancelBookingCommand uses a record with a positional Guid Id parameter (same pattern as DeleteClientCommand). Conflict is Chairly.Api.Shared.Results.Conflict; Success and NotFound are OneOf.Types.

userStories.title: Status transition handlers and endpoints (confirm, start, complete, no-show)
userStories.description: As an owner, manager, or staff member, I want to confirm, start, complete, or mark a booking as no-show so I can track the booking's real-world progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/ConfirmBooking/ConfirmBookingCommand.cs: internal sealed record ConfirmBookingCommand(Guid Id) : IRequest<OneOf<Success, NotFound, Conflict>>

Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/ConfirmBooking/ConfirmBookingHandler.cs: load booking, NotFound if null, Conflict if any of ConfirmedAtUtc/StartedAtUtc/CompletedAtUtc/CancelledAtUtc/NoShowAtUtc is non-null (must be in Scheduled state), set ConfirmedAtUtc = UtcNow and ConfirmedBy = Guid.Empty, SaveChanges, return Success
Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/ConfirmBooking/ConfirmBookingEndpoint.cs: MapPost("/{id:guid}/confirm", ...) returns NoContent/NotFound/Conflict
Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/StartBooking/StartBookingCommand.cs: internal sealed record StartBookingCommand(Guid Id) : IRequest<OneOf<Success, NotFound, Conflict>>

Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/StartBooking/StartBookingHandler.cs: load booking, NotFound if null, Conflict if StartedAtUtc/CompletedAtUtc/CancelledAtUtc/NoShowAtUtc is non-null (must be Scheduled or Confirmed), set StartedAtUtc = UtcNow and StartedBy = Guid.Empty, SaveChanges, return Success
Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/StartBooking/StartBookingEndpoint.cs: MapPost("/{id:guid}/start", ...) returns NoContent/NotFound/Conflict
Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/CompleteBooking/CompleteBookingCommand.cs: internal sealed record CompleteBookingCommand(Guid Id) : IRequest<OneOf<Success, NotFound, Conflict>>

Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/CompleteBooking/CompleteBookingHandler.cs: load booking, NotFound if null, Conflict if StartedAtUtc == null || CompletedAtUtc != null || CancelledAtUtc != null || NoShowAtUtc != null (must be InProgress), set CompletedAtUtc = UtcNow and CompletedBy = Guid.Empty, SaveChanges, return Success
Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/CompleteBooking/CompleteBookingEndpoint.cs: MapPost("/{id:guid}/complete", ...) returns NoContent/NotFound/Conflict
Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/NoShowBooking/NoShowBookingCommand.cs: internal sealed record NoShowBookingCommand(Guid Id) : IRequest<OneOf<Success, NotFound, Conflict>>

Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/NoShowBooking/NoShowBookingHandler.cs: load booking, NotFound if null, Conflict if StartedAtUtc/CompletedAtUtc/CancelledAtUtc/NoShowAtUtc is non-null (must be Scheduled or Confirmed), set NoShowAtUtc = UtcNow and NoShowBy = Guid.Empty, SaveChanges, return Success
Chairly.Api/Features/Bookings/NoShowBooking/NoShowBookingEndpoint.cs: MapPost("/{id:guid}/no-show", ...) returns NoContent/NotFound/Conflict
BookingEndpoints.cs updated to call all four new MapXxx() methods
dotnet build src/backend/Chairly.slnx passes
dotnet test src/backend/Chairly.slnx passes
dotnet format src/backend/Chairly.slnx --verify-no-changes passes
userStories.notes: All four handlers follow the exact same structure: (1) load booking by Id+TenantId, (2) return NotFound if null, (3) return Conflict if invalid state, (4) set the timestamp + by field, (5) SaveChangesAsync, (6) return Success. Use #pragma warning disable/restore MA0026 for each Guid.Empty assignment. All four endpoint files follow the same pattern as CancelBookingEndpoint.cs — just change the route suffix and command type. Keep the MA0026 pragma pattern exactly as in CreateClientHandler.

userStories.title: Handler unit tests for all booking use cases
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for all booking handlers so regressions are caught automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: Chairly.Tests/Features/Bookings/BookingHandlerTests.cs created using the same InMemory pattern as ClientHandlerTests.cs (CreateDbContext helper, await using var db, no [Theory] unless needed)

Helper methods: CreateTestBooking(db, staffMemberId?, clientId?, startTime?, cancelled?, noShow?, completed?, started?, confirmed?) — creates and saves a booking with one BookingService; CreateTestClient(db, deleted?); CreateTestStaffMember(db, deactivated?); CreateTestService(db, active?, duration?)
GetBookingsListHandler test: returns only bookings for the default tenant (ignores other tenants)
GetBookingsListHandler test: date filter returns only bookings on that date
GetBookingsListHandler test: staffMemberId filter returns only bookings for that staff member
GetBookingHandler test: returns BookingResponse with correct derived status — test 'Confirmed' (ConfirmedAtUtc set, no others)
GetBookingHandler test: returns NotFound for unknown Guid
CreateBookingHandler test: happy path — creates booking, snapshots service name/duration/price, sets TenantId = DefaultTenantId, CreatedAtUtc is set, BookingServices has correct count
CreateBookingHandler test: returns NotFound when client does not exist
CreateBookingHandler test: returns NotFound when client is soft-deleted
CreateBookingHandler test: returns NotFound when staff member does not exist
CreateBookingHandler test: returns NotFound when staff member is deactivated
CreateBookingHandler test: returns NotFound when a service is inactive
CreateBookingHandler test: throws ValidationException when ServiceIds is empty
CreateBookingHandler test: returns Conflict when staff member already has an overlapping booking (non-cancelled)
CreateBookingHandler test: does NOT return Conflict when overlapping booking is cancelled
UpdateBookingHandler test: happy path updates booking and recalculates EndTime
UpdateBookingHandler test: returns Conflict when booking is in terminal state (e.g. CancelledAtUtc set)
UpdateBookingHandler test: overlap check excludes the booking being updated (no self-conflict)
CancelBookingHandler test: happy path sets CancelledAtUtc
CancelBookingHandler test: returns Conflict when booking is already cancelled
CancelBookingHandler test: InProgress booking (StartedAtUtc set) CAN be cancelled — returns Success
ConfirmBookingHandler test: happy path sets ConfirmedAtUtc
ConfirmBookingHandler test: returns Conflict when booking is already confirmed
StartBookingHandler test: happy path sets StartedAtUtc from Confirmed state
CompleteBookingHandler test: happy path sets CompletedAtUtc from InProgress state
CompleteBookingHandler test: returns Conflict when booking is in Scheduled state (StartedAtUtc null)
NoShowBookingHandler test: happy path sets NoShowAtUtc from Scheduled state
dotnet build src/backend/Chairly.slnx passes
dotnet test src/backend/Chairly.slnx passes
dotnet format src/backend/Chairly.slnx --verify-no-changes passes
userStories.notes: Follow ClientHandlerTests.cs exactly for the InMemory setup. The CreateTestStaffMember helper must set DeactivatedAtUtc = null for active staff (and optionally DeactivatedAtUtc = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow.AddDays(-1) for the deactivated test case). For the overlap test: create a booking for staffMember A from 10:00-11:00, then try to create another from 10:30-11:30 — expect Conflict. For the no-overlap-when-cancelled test: same times but the existing booking has CancelledAtUtc set — expect Success. The StaffMember entity uses DeactivatedAtUtc (not DeletedAtUtc) — check StaffMember.cs. For CreateTestService, set IsActive = true by default and Duration = TimeSpan.FromMinutes(60) by default. For CreateTestBooking, set EndTime = StartTime + service duration.
